title: Refreshable MV does not save local data on shards. Possible bug in documentation or CH
description:
### Company or project name
_No response_
### Describe the unexpected behaviour
I have a dev cluster in docker with 3 shards + 1 zookeeper. Version 25.8.10.7-lts
For some reason when I create Refreshable MV on Replicated database it updates data on one shard and remove the data on other 2 shards (shard with data is take randomly)
I see in logs that each shard executes the refreshable MV each minute, but the data appears only on one of them, local data, from local table for that shard, two other shards have data in source table, but no data in target table
### Which ClickHouse versions are affected?
25.8.10.7
25.5.2.47
### How to reproduce
Here is full sql log to reproduce my behavior
```sql
create database test on cluster '{cluster}' ENGINE=Replicated('/clickhouse/tables/test','{shard}','{replica}')
create table test.raw_source_local
(
id Int32,
time DateTime
)ENGINE=ReplicatedMergeTree()
Primary KEY id
ORDER BY id;
-- execute this on each shard separately, manually, change numbers from 1000 to 2000, from 2000 to 3000
INSERT INTO test.raw_source_local (id, time)
SELECT
number AS id,
-- Generate a random timestamp between the start and end date and convert it to DateTime
toDateTime(
toUnixTimestamp('2024-01-01 00:00:00') +
(rand() % (toUnixTimestamp('2024-12-31 23:59:59') - toUnixTimestamp('2024-01-01 00:00:00')))
) AS time
FROM
numbers(1, 1000);
create table test.table_for_mv
(
sum Int32,
date Date
)ENGINE=ReplicatedMergeTree()
Primary KEY date
ORDER BY date;
create materialized view test.mv_from_raw_source_local_to_table
refresh every 1 minute
TO test.table_for_mv
AS
SELECT sum(id) as sum, toDate(time) as date from test.raw_source_local group by toDate(time);
```
### Expected behavior
Each shard updates its own local target table with data from local source table
### Error message and/or stacktrace
log is too long, adding it via pastebin https://pastebin.com/2uZZuT9G
### Additional context
_No response_
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test2.raw_source_local (id Int32, time DateTime, value Float64 DEFAULT 0.0) ENGINE=ReplicatedMergeTree() PRIMARY KEY id ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test2.raw_source_local (id, time, value) SELECT number AS id, toDateTime('2024-01-01 00:00:00') + INTERVAL number SECOND AS time, rand() * 100 AS value FROM dual CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 1000;
CREATE TABLE test2.table_for_mv (sum_value Float64, date Date, count_id UInt32) ENGINE=ReplicatedMergeTree() PRIMARY KEY date ORDER BY date;

CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW test2.mv_from_raw_source_local_to_table TO test2.table_for_mv AS SELECT SUM(value) AS sum_value, toDate(time) AS date, COUNT(*) AS count_id FROM test2.raw_source_local GROUP BY toDate(time);
key_bug_features: Refreshable MV updates data on only one shard
